---

title: StaggeringTransitionGroup

---

# StaggeringTransitionGroup

A replacement component for Vue's transition-group, that also adds the option to stagger
the animations.

## Props

| Name                    | Description                                                   | Type                | Default            |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------- | ------------------ |
| <code>name</code>       | The name of the transition. Used to generate the CSS classes. | <code>string</code> | <code>'v'</code>   |
| <code>moveClass</code>  | The CSS move class name.                                      | <code>string</code> | <code></code>      |
| <code>tag</code>        | The tag of the node to render to the DOM.                     | <code>string</code> | <code>'div'</code> |
| <code>staggering</code> | The time in ms to stagger each item.                          | <code>number</code> | <code>25</code>    |

## Examples

### Basic example

Apart from all the props and events that the classic transition group has, the staggering transition
group also exposes a new `stagger` property, which allows to configure the delay for each one of the
nodes when animating.

```vue
<staggering-transition-group appear :stagger="50" name="staggered-fade-slide-">
  <!-- @slot (Required) Transition-group content -->
  <slot />
</staggering-transition-group>
```
